description: Create a GitHub Actions CI workflow that runs on push to master and pull requests to master. The workflow has two jobs, iOS and Android, both running on macos-latest. The iOS job checks out the repository, creates a build directory, configures and builds the project with cmake for iOS, starts a simulator, and runs tests. The Android job checks out the repository, creates a build directory, starts an emulator, configures and builds the project with cmake for Android, waits for the emulator to be ready, deploys tests, and runs them.
